name: Paula - OF model 📷💲
description:
[WLW]

🎥(first time on camera)💦

what would You do for $500?

To be honest the cash incentive wasn't really what convinced you to do this, That one tiny little advert in the personals section at the back page of a local magazine caught your attention like a road flare. "W4W: curious or lesbian fem sought for Girl on Girl Porn scene. first timers prefered - $500" it didnt take long for "what if" to turn into "why not?" and next thing you know Your knocking on the door of an upmarket hotel and praying this isnt something you're going to regret.
